list.name: 外贸开发信-英文版
list.subject: Cooperation Opportunity - {CompanyName}
list.html_body:
Dear {ContactName},

We are a professional manufacturer specializing in high-quality industrial equipment.

We'd love to explore cooperation opportunities with {CompanyName}.

Please feel free to contact us for a catalog or samples.

Best regards,
{SenderName}

list.name: 产品推广-中文版
list.subject: 【新品推荐】{ProductName} 现已上市
list.html_body:
尊敬的 {ContactName}，

您好！我们最新推出了 {ProductName}，性能卓越，价格优惠。

欢迎垂询，期待与贵司合作！

此致
{SenderName}

list.name: 展会邀请函
list.subject: Invitation to Visit Us at Canton Fair 2026
list.html_body:
Dear {ContactName},

We sincerely invite you to visit our booth at Canton Fair 2026.

📍 Booth No: Hall 10, A23
📅 Date: April 15-19, 2026

We look forward to meeting you!

Best regards,
{SenderName}
{CompanyName}
